notes:
## Meeting Manager v5.1.8

Installer per macOS e Windows.

| Piattaforma | File |
|---|---|
| **macOS** (Apple Silicon) | `Meeting Manager-*-arm64.dmg` |
| **macOS** (Intel) | `Meeting Manager-*.dmg` |
| **Windows** | `Meeting Manager Setup *.exe` |

> **macOS**: dopo l'installazione eseguire una volta:
> ```
> xattr -cr /Applications/Meeting\ Manager.app
> ```
